ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein in amino acids */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database of the protein (e.g., UniProt, PDB) */,
  "source_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier in the source database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the protein record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the protein record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the protein record (e.g., draft, published, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chain */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the chain belongs to */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the chain */,
  "start_residue" INTEGER /* Start residue position of the chain */,
  "end_residue" INTEGER /* End residue position of the chain */,
  "chain_type" TEXT /* Type of the chain (e.g., polypeptide, RNA, DNA) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chain record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chain record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chain record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the chain record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chains_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residues" (
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residue */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chain the residue belongs to */,
  "residue_number" INTEGER /* Position number of the residue in the chain */,
  "modelled_residue" TEXT /* Modeled residue (e.g., LEU, GLU) */,
  "actual_residue" TEXT /* Actual residue (e.g., - for missing data) */,
  "residue_type" TEXT /* Type of the residue (e.g., amino acid, nucleotide) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment on the residue (e.g., EXPRESSION TAG) */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to external databases (e.g., UNP Q99U58) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the residue record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the residue record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the residue record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the residue record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., EXPRESSION, MODIFICATION) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_comments_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the reference belongs to */,
  "reference_source" TEXT /* Source of the reference (e.g., UNP, PDB) */,
  "reference_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier in the reference source (e.g., Q99U58) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reference */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_references_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chain_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chain the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chain_versions_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chain_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_versions_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_versions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES residue_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "database_url" TEXT /* URL of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_external_database_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the link belongs to */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external database the link belongs to */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier in the external database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_external_database_links_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES external_databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_external_database_links_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_external_database_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the link belongs to */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external database the link belongs to */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier in the external database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_external_database_links_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES external_databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_external_database_links_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)
